channel.title: CMG — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on CMG (Chipotle Mexican Grill) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED CMG (+342%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added CMG in Q4 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: EXITED CMG (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) exited CMG in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Bill Ackman: EXITED CMG (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) exited CMG in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Ackman)

item.title: Lee Ainslie: NEW POSITION CMG (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) new position CMG in Q4 2025 · 2.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Lee Ainslie)

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED CMG (+68%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added CMG in Q4 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED CMG (+17%) · Q3 2025

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED CMG (-6%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed CMG in Q3 2025 · 21.4% of portfolio. Small Chipotle trim after 2024 gains.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Ackman)
